name: Joke-Stir Punch Bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the fruit cocktail, reserving the liquid.
2. Arrange cherry halves from the fruit cocktail in the bottom of a ring mold that fits into a punch bowl.
3. Garnish with small pieces of greenery.
4. Add about 1/2 inch water; freeze.
5. Add the remaining fruit cocktail and enough water to fill the mold three-quarters full. Freeze.
6. Unmold. Place in the punch bowl, cherry-side up.
7. Pour lemonade, chilled ginger ale, pineapple juice, and fruit cocktail liquid into the bowl; blend.
